outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Drone strikes UAE nuclear plant, highlighting risks of renewed Iran war
outlets.summary: NPR covers the Barakah nuclear plant drone strike and what it means for escalation risk, as Trump schedules NSC Situation Room meeting for May 19.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Israel intercepts Gaza flotilla off Cyprus; Turkey condemns it as piracy
outlets.summary: Israeli naval commandos board 16-17 vessels in broad daylight off Cyprus, the largest flotilla interception since the conflict began. Turkey calls it piracy.

outlets.name: CBS News
outlets.headline: Iran war re-escalation risks keep oil high as diplomacy staggers — live updates
outlets.summary: CBS News tracks the day's developments: flotilla interception, Lebanon death toll crossing 3,000, Iran PGSA launch, and Trump's Situation Room meeting planned for May 19.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump to convene Situation Room meeting on Iran — no nuclear deal in sight, clock ticking
outlets.summary: Fox News live coverage of Trump's NSC meeting scheduled for May 19, his 'Clock is Ticking' warning, and commentary calling for seizure of Iran's HEU stockpile.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Trump: Iran knows what's going to happen soon — not open to concessions
outlets.summary: Trump tells NY Post he is 'not open' to any concessions and warns Iran its leaders 'know what's going to be happening soon.'

outlets.name: Israel National News
outlets.headline: Saudi Arabia retaliates with strikes on Iran-backed militias in Iraq after drone interception
outlets.summary: Arutz Sheva reports Saudi Arabia struck Iran-backed militias in southern Iraq following Saturday's interception of 3 Iraqi-launched drones in Saudi airspace.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Iran delivers peace proposal via Pakistan; Lebanon death toll tops 3,000
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera's live blog covers Iran's revised peace proposal via Pakistan, the flotilla interception, Lebanon's 3,020 death toll, and Turkey's mediation push.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Iran sets up Hormuz transit authority to charge ships for passage; Lebanon ceasefire fraying
outlets.summary: Euronews reports on the formal launch of Iran's PGSA Hormuz toll system and continued IDF strikes in Lebanon despite the 45-day ceasefire extension.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Iran sends revised peace proposal to US via Pakistan; enrichment terms remain key sticking point
outlets.summary: Iran's foreign ministry confirms it submitted a revised peace proposal to Washington via Pakistani mediators. Duration of enrichment freeze — 5 years (Iran) vs 20 years (US) — is the core unresolved issue.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Live: Israeli navy intercepts Gaza flotilla; Lebanon ceasefire holds in name only
outlets.summary: Times of Israel liveblog covers the flotilla interception off Cyprus, Lebanon death toll passing 3,000, Netanyahu's security meeting, and the NYT poll showing waning US support for the war.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF officer killed by Hezbollah drone; strikes continue in southern Lebanon
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports on Capt. Maoz Israel Recanati (24, Golani Brigade) killed by Hezbollah drone on May 17 — the seventh IDF soldier killed in southern Lebanon since the ceasefire.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: NYT/Siena poll: 65% of Americans disapprove of Trump's Iran war handling; 37% approval
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post and Times of Israel cover the NYT/Siena poll showing Trump's approval at a second-term low of 37%, with nearly two-thirds of Americans saying the decision to go to war was wrong.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: We will not bow before any power; Iranians must accept war hardships
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Pezeshkian's defiant speech calling the conflict Iran's 'Third Imposed War' and preparing Iranians for continued hardships as diplomatic efforts with the US via Pakistan continue.

outlets.name: Tasnim News
outlets.headline: Iran launches Hormuz Strait Affairs Authority — PGSA X account now operational
outlets.summary: Tasnim News reports on the official launch of the PGSA X account, formalizing Iran's toll-based Hormuz transit system for approved vessels excluding US and Israeli ships.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian says Iranians must accept inflation as country is at war
outlets.summary: Iran International provides independent coverage of Pezeshkian's speech, noting the contrast between his public defiance and the continued back-channel peace negotiations via Pakistani mediators.
